name: Ocal Browser v3.3.10-beta: Pro Purple-Glow Edition
body:
### 🌌 The Next Frontier of Agentic Browsing

This major release introduces the **v3.3.10-beta** update, focusing on 'Elite Core' stabilization and UI performance improvements.

#### ⚙️ System Level & Core Stabilization
- **v3.3 'Elite Core' Refinement**: Enhanced stabilization for the PDF engine and internal protocol handlers.
- **Optimized Context Manager**: Improved handling of cross-tab persistent context for agentic interactions.
- **Large File Associations**: Robust handling of OS-level file associations in Windows.

#### 🎨 UI Performance & Aesthetics
- **Purple-Glow Optimization**: Faster initialization of glassmorphic elements and radial glow animations on the home page.
- **Interface Polish**: Sleeker layout transitions and improved scrollbar suppression across windows.

#### 🛡️ Shield Hub v2.0 (Elite Modernization)
- **Bento-Grid Analytics**: Completely redesigned privacy center with real-time interactive statistics.
- **High-Fidelity UI**: Continued implementation of the 'Pro' design language globally.
